commands: ffmpeg -i {file} -c:v hevc_nvenc -tag:v hvc1 -preset p6 -profile:v main -pix_fmt yuv420p -r 30 -g 60 -rc vbr_hq -b:v 10M -maxrate 15M -bufsize 90M -movflags +faststart -an {file_dir}/lb_de.mp4
ffmpeg -hwaccel none -c:v libvpx-vp9 -i {file} -vf format=yuva420p -c:v libvpx -pix_fmt yuva420p -auto-alt-ref 0 -metadata:s:v:0 alpha_mode=1 -crf 10 -b:v 2M -an {file_dir}/hud_de.webm
